metadata.description: Sonomos privacy plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: canary
plugins.description: Sonomos Canary — persistent PII leak counter. 38 checksum-validated regex detectors (plus your own custom rules) and Claude self-scan track sensitive data you expose to Claude, Canary Tokens give a CERTAIN alarm the instant a planted decoy secret leaks, and Canary Wrapped turns your history into a shareable recap — with a weighted risk score, an interactive dashboard, a persistent HUD, and a plugin-security audit for your installed extensions.
